actions.title: 8 HERO clips ready to publish
actions.detail: These scored 90+ — they're your premium content. Review at /best_of.html and post anywhere.

actions.title: 1 OK clips below the 75 threshold
actions.detail: These are NOT auto-staged. Eyeball them at /clip_reviewer.html. Likely low-motion scenes (meditation, contemplation).

actions.title: 17 clips staged in ready_to_publish
actions.detail: Each has clip.mp4 + thumbnail + youtube.json + social.json. Drag-drop into share_packages/{char}/{name}.zip for one-click upload.

actions.title: 9/16 achievements unlocked
actions.detail: 7 more milestones to chase. Check /achievements.html to see what's left.

actions.title: Refresh all morning state in one command
actions.detail: Run morning_refresh.py to regenerate every report, image, and badge.

actions.title: Push the dataset to HuggingFace
actions.detail: Run hf_dataset_readme_gen.py --push to update the README on HF with current stats.
